summary: Comprehensive testing of Takt Time application bug fixes and new team configuration features. Backend APIs fully functional, pause/resume bug fix verified, team organization UI implemented correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Unable to consistently open team edit dialog during automated testing
ui_bugs.details: Dialog functionality appears implemented but automation couldn't reliably trigger it

passed_tests: Backend API CRUD operations (sites, lines, screens)
Takt control operations (start, pause, resume, stop, next)
Pause/resume elapsed time preservation bug fix
Status badge changes (EN ATTENTE → EN COURS)
Team organization UI layout and structure
Responsive UI layout (no field overlap issues)
action_item_for_main_agent: Team edit dialog accessibility: Investigate and ensure team edit buttons properly open the dialog with all required fields (team name, schedules, takt duration, break configuration, and 'Alerte avant fin pause' slider). Verify all team management features are fully functional in the UI.
